name: io.github.inhuman/mcp-k8s-ephemeral-job
title: Kubernetes Ephemeral Job
description: Runs a command in a throwaway Kubernetes pod and returns exit code, output and artifacts.

runtimeArguments.name: --volume
runtimeArguments.description: Mount the kubeconfig directory read-only so the server can reach the cluster.

kubeconfig_dir.description: Host directory holding your kubeconfig, e.g. /home/you/.kube

runtimeArguments.name: --read-only
runtimeArguments.description: Read-only root filesystem — the server writes nothing locally.

runtimeArguments.name: --memory
runtimeArguments.description: Memory limit for the server process itself.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_K8S_ALLOWED_IMAGES
environmentVariables.description: Strict image allowlist (CSV). Empty means every call is rejected, so this must be set.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_K8S_KUBECONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Path to the kubeconfig inside the container. Empty = use in-cluster credentials.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_K8S_NAMESPACE
environmentVariables.description: Namespace the ephemeral pods are created in. Needs a Role/RoleBinding for jobs and pods.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_K8S_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: MCP transport: stdio | http | sse. Must be 'stdio' for direct docker/stdio use.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_K8S_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_S
environmentVariables.description: Default wall-clock timeout per job, seconds.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_K8S_MAX_TIMEOUT_S
environmentVariables.description: Maximum wall-clock timeout a caller may request, seconds.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_K8S_MAX_OUTPUT_BYTES
environmentVariables.description: Cap on combined stdout/stderr before truncation.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_K8S_MAX_ARTIFACT_BYTES
environmentVariables.description: Cap on the total size of returned artifacts.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_K8S_MAX_CONCURRENT
environmentVariables.description: Maximum ephemeral pods running at the same time.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_K8S_DEFAULT_CPU
environmentVariables.description: Pod CPU request; limits come from the caller or the namespace LimitRange.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_K8S_DEFAULT_MEMORY
environmentVariables.description: Pod memory request; limits come from the caller or the namespace LimitRange.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_K8S_SIDECAR_IMAGE
environmentVariables.description: Helper image used to inject input files and collect artifacts.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_K8S_CLONE_IMAGE
environmentVariables.description: Image carrying git for the clone init container. Empty disables the clone field.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_K8S_CLONE_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Secret with git tokens, mounted only on the cloner. Empty disables the clone field.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_K8S_CACHE_PVC
environmentVariables.description: Existing PVC mounted into every job pod as a shared cache. Empty = no cache.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_K8S_CACHE_MOUNT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Where the cache PVC is mounted, e.g. /go/pkg/mod. Empty = no cache.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_K8S_JOB_EXTRA_ENV
environmentVariables.description: JSON object of env vars added to every job pod; caller keys win on collision.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_K8S_AUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional X-MCP-AUTH token required on every request (http/sse transports only).
